scripts.test:integration: pnpm build && pnpm build:client && pnpm --filter ./testing/integration/ts test
scripts.test:python: cd clients/python && PYTHON_BIN=${PYTHON:-python3} && "$PYTHON_BIN" -c "import sys; raise SystemExit(0 if sys.version_info >= (3, 11) else 'Python 3.11+ required; set PYTHON=/path/to/python3.11')" && "$PYTHON_BIN" -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -q -e ".[dev]" && pytest tests/
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:client && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:python
